title: Concept Definition
description: Schema for defining a concept within a user-provided semantic layer.

name.description: The singular name of the concept.

plural_name.description: The plural name of the concept. If not provided, a simple 's' suffix might be assumed by some tools.

description.description: A human-readable description of the concept.

attributes.description: A list of attributes belonging to this concept.

type.description: The data type of the attribute (e.g., string, integer, boolean, date, or a reference to another concept/enum).

description.description: A human-readable description of the attribute.

required.description: Whether this attribute is mandatory for an instance of the concept.

is_identifier.description: Marks this attribute as a primary or unique identifier for the concept.

default_value.description: A default value for this attribute if not specified.

format.description: A specific format for the attribute's type (e.g., 'email', 'uuid' for string; 'date-time').

enum_values.description: If the attribute type is an inline enumeration, this lists the possible values.

example.description: An example value for this attribute.
